diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How may I assist you today?
[Caller] Hi, I used 40 Resin on a domain and got zero drops. I have a screenshot.
[Agent] I can help with that. For security, could you provide your UID?
[Caller] 603245891.
[Agent] Thank you. And to verify, could you confirm the HoYoverse email on file?
[Caller] mchen at email dot com.
[Agent] Identity verified. Could you provide the approximate timestamp of the failed domain run and confirm you have a screenshot with the timestamp visible?
[Caller] April 19th around 8 PM Pacific. Yes, I have the screenshot.
[Agent] Thank you. Let me check known incidents. No confirmed incident in the America region for that window, so this goes to individual review. Per the bug compensation SOP, for a verified lost-Resin case with screenshot evidence and a UID match, the standard compensation is 60 Primogems plus the lost Resin reimbursed as a Fragile Resin.
[Caller] Okay.
[Agent] I am opening compensation ticket TK44524 with your screenshot attached for review and queuing an in-game mail for 60 Primogems and one Fragile Resin. Per policy, if the review finds the loss was caused by a third-party tool the compensation may be reversed. Can you confirm you were using only official clients?
[Caller] Yes, just the game on my PS5.
[Agent] Noted. The mail should arrive within a few minutes. Is there anything further?
[Caller] No, thanks.
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. Have a good day.
